text_uthmani: إِنَّهُمْ إِن يَظْهَرُوا۟ عَلَيْكُمْ يَرْجُمُوكُمْ أَوْ يُعِيدُوكُمْ فِى مِلَّتِهِمْ وَلَن تُفْلِحُوٓا۟ إِذًا أَبَدًۭا
translation_en: for, behold, if they should come to know of you, they might stone you to death or force you back to their faith-in which case you would never attain to any good!"
